birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Those from the Zhalong and Xianghai regions migrate south in autumn via Panjin in Liaoning, follow the western coast of Bohai Bay, cross the Yellow River Delta, and mainly winter in the coastal wetlands of Yancheng, Jiangsu
